purpose: Tracks deterministic strategy-logic test families for the second-leg entry thesis.

families.goal: Verify trend qualification from EMA location, normalized slope, and basic session context.
Confirm strong impulse detection is distinguishable from noisy or overlapping bars.
Verify two-leg counting, invalidation, and stale pullback handling.
Verify stop-entry, protective-stop placement inputs, and room-to-structure gating.
Verify participation rules reject dead or chaotic regimes and disallowed sessions.
Verify armed-entry expiry, pre-fill cancellation, and donor-style simple-trail behavior after fill.
Pin the first canonical labeled bar sequences for valid and invalid second-leg setups.
